sql.oracle: CREATE INDEX IDX_FCQUEUE_ENTITYKEY_DH ON AD_FCQUEUE (ENTITY_TYPE, ENTITY_KEY, DH_CRIACAO DESC)
sql.mssql: CREATE INDEX IDX_FCQUEUE_ENTITYKEY_DH ON AD_FCQUEUE (ENTITY_TYPE, ENTITY_KEY, DH_CRIACAO DESC)

sql.oracle: CREATE INDEX IDX_FCQUEUE_ETYPE_STATUS_DH ON AD_FCQUEUE (ENTITY_TYPE, STATUS, DH_CRIACAO DESC)
sql.mssql: CREATE INDEX IDX_FCQUEUE_ETYPE_STATUS_DH ON AD_FCQUEUE (ENTITY_TYPE, STATUS, DH_CRIACAO DESC)

sql.oracle: CREATE INDEX IDX_FCLOG_OP_REF_DHREG ON AD_FCLOG (OPERACAO, REFERENCIA, DH_REGISTRO DESC)
sql.mssql: CREATE INDEX IDX_FCLOG_OP_REF_DHREG ON AD_FCLOG (OPERACAO, REFERENCIA, DH_REGISTRO DESC)

sql.oracle: CREATE INDEX IDX_FCLOG_OP_DHLOG ON AD_FCLOG (OPERACAO, DH_LOG DESC)
sql.mssql: CREATE INDEX IDX_FCLOG_OP_DHLOG ON AD_FCLOG (OPERACAO, DH_LOG DESC)
